{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203234002CE5FBEEED060F85013"}"},"total":1304},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7472341384404943641","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"难得的一本穿越不带系统的小说，多少有常识带点脑子看。也符合事物发展的道理，不像别的那些一两年就从封建社会完成工业革命了。","text_exts":[{"e":58,"s":54,"text":"工业革命","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B7%A5%E4%B8%9A%E9%9D%A9%E5%91%BD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177412102060F85013%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227472341384404943641%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227350892544626019390%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B7%A5%E4%B8%9A%E9%9D%A9%E5%91%BD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739794145,"group_id":"7350892544626019390","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8jmcZgk2fI9DqAkwMeqlJsZtB2lPsZUBCEz/7ZKdYk4","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4350132602812366","user_name":"用户名1411249"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4350132602812366","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7350892544626019390","book_info":{"abstract":"（搞笑+种田+无系统）好消息，魂穿王府成为世子，坏消息，世子体验卡仅剩最后三天。
更好的消息，老皇帝青眼有加，更坏的消息，老皇帝即将退位。
齐烨暗暗发狠，我命由我不由天，谁再被坑谁是狗！
新皇：跪下，朕求你点事，给朕弄点零花钱去。
齐烨：陛下莫要逼人太甚！
新皇：请帮朕弄点零花钱。
